diagnosis: The solution fields are sufficiently clear.

updated_solution_definition.solution_summary: A guided intake assistant collects triage context and prepares structured handoff notes.
updated_solution_definition.how_it_works: The assistant asks bounded questions, records answers, and creates a structured summary for review.
updated_solution_definition.workflow_change: Nurses use a guided intake flow before manual triage review instead of starting from free-text notes.
updated_solution_definition.current_solutions: Current work relies on manual notes and static protocol sheets.
updated_solution_definition.value_differential: The proposal gives a more consistent intake summary without replacing clinical judgement.
updated_solution_definition.scope_limits: The first version covers adult emergency intake notes and excludes diagnosis or prioritization decisions.
assumptions: Nursing staff can answer the guided questions during intake.
